channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: David Lee Roth Joins Teddy Swims at Stagecoach for ‘Jump’
item.description: When David Lee Roth meets Teddy Swims at Stagecoach 🎸🎤 Let's get ready to jump! 🤘 #Stagecoach2022 #MusicCollab

item.title: Fans Choose Noah Kahan’s ‘The Great Divide’ as This Week’s Favorite New Music
item.description: 🎶 Noah Kahan's 'The Great Divide' is the ultimate fan fave this week! 🌟 Who else can't stop hitting repeat? 🔥 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Queens Of The Stone Age Reunite With Nick Oliveri At Joshua Tree
item.description: 🌵 Rock legends Queens Of The Stone Age unite with Nick Oliveri at Joshua Tree! 🎸 Who's ready for some desert rock vibes? 🎶 #RockNRollRevival

item.title: Madonna Debuts New Song In WeHo, Tries To Get Mic Back From Drunk Addison Rae
item.description: 🎤 Madonna brings the drama in WeHo debut! Who will win the mic battle - the queen of pop or Addison Rae? 💃 #Madonna #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Foo Fighters Bring Your Favorite Toy Live Debuts To SNL UK
item.description: 🎸 Rock out with Foo Fighters on SNL UK as they debut Your Favorite Toy live! Who's tuning in? 🤘 #FooFighters #SNLUK #YourFavoriteToy
